feat.name: Perfected Evaluations
feat.text: You instantly assess the strengths and weaknesses of the enemy forces. When you use Rapid Assessment, you can attempt up to six Recall Knowledge checks against enemies you are observing.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.
